class:
TYPEID_N5PLSKLNAL n5plsklnal Składnik naliczenia
XDF_PLACE_DOK_ZROD
function n5plsklnal_as_text() : n5plsklnal_as_text="" if this_.wrefDokument is nothing then exit function end if dim strText : strText = this_.wrefDokument.text + " / "
dim pSklWyn : set pSklWyn = this_.parent.n5plnaliczenie_gsfz_2(this_.wrefDokument,this_.nLPDokZrodl,nothing)
if not pSklWyn is nothing then if not pSklWyn.pSchemat is nothing then strText = strText + pSklWyn.pSchemat.strNazwa end if end if n5plsklnal_as_text = strText end function
